title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Voltas

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Voltas
jsonLd.description:
We at Voltas are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Voltas:
Voltas is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas!
